message:
fix(cli,daemon): 6 bugs from deep audit — mount check, zombies, template, deprecated keys, bytes_freed, writable

1. cli_app: run_interactive_emergency used root_paths.first() for target_free
   check instead of candidate's actual mount — now uses FsStatsCollector
2. notifications: spawn() child processes (notify-send, osascript, curl) were
   never reaped, accumulating zombies in long-running daemon — now reaped in
   detached threads
3. notifications: BallastReplenished.mount was not extracted in webhook template
   rendering, producing "N/A" for ${MOUNT}
4. bootstrap: check_config_health used substring matching for deprecated keys,
   causing false positives (e.g. "log_level" in comments) — now matches TOML
   key assignments only
5. uninstall: bytes_freed over-reported for ShellProfileEntry edits (counted
   full file size instead of delta) — now uses size_before - size_after
6. integrations: is_writable used permissions().readonly() instead of
   nix::access(W_OK), inconsistent with rest of codebase (bd-1l7)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
